title: Helm Chart.yaml
description: Schema for the Chart.yaml file that describes a Helm chart. Chart.yaml contains metadata about the chart including its name, version, dependencies, and maintainers. This file is required in every Helm chart.

apiVersion.description: The chart API version. v2 is for Helm 3 charts, v1 is for Helm 2 charts.

name.description: The name of the chart. Must match the directory name.

version.description: The SemVer 2 version of the chart. This is used as a release marker and must be incremented for each new release.

kubeVersion.description: A SemVer range of compatible Kubernetes versions. Helm validates this constraint during installation.

description.description: A single-sentence description of the chart.

type.description: The type of the chart. Application charts are installable, library charts provide utilities for other charts.

keywords.description: A list of keywords associated with the chart for search and categorization.

home.description: The URL of the project home page.

sources.description: A list of URLs to source code for this chart.

dependencies.description: A list of chart dependencies. Helm downloads these charts into the charts/ directory during dependency resolution.

maintainers.description: A list of chart maintainers with contact information.

icon.description: A URL to an SVG or PNG icon to display in the Helm UI and artifact hub.

appVersion.description: The version of the application that the chart deploys. This is informational and does not affect chart version calculations.

deprecated.description: Whether this chart is deprecated. When set to true, Helm shows a warning during installation.

annotations.description: Annotations are key-value pairs used by Artifact Hub and other tools to store additional metadata.

Dependency.description: A chart dependency specifying another chart that must be present in the charts/ directory.

name.description: The name of the dependency chart.

version.description: The SemVer range for the dependency version.

repository.description: The URL of the chart repository where the dependency is hosted. Can also use the alias:// prefix for named repositories.

condition.description: A YAML path in the parent chart's values that resolves to a boolean, controlling whether this dependency is enabled.

tags.description: Tags used to group chart dependencies together for bulk enable/disable.

import-values.description: Mapping of values to import from the child chart into the parent chart's values.

alias.description: An alias name for the dependency, allowing the same chart to be used multiple times with different configurations.

enabled.description: Whether the dependency is enabled by default.

Maintainer.description: Contact information for a chart maintainer.

url.description: The maintainer's personal or organizational URL.
